### Invalid Trac Ticket Status

The referenced ticket **ticket-{ticket_id}** is currently in the **{stage}** stage, which is not an accepted state for a new pull request.

**Acceptable stages are:** {acceptable_stages}

**What to do:**

1. Check the ticket at https://code.djangoproject.com/ticket/{ticket_id} to see its current status.
2. If the ticket is **Unreviewed**, wait for the Django triage team to review and accept it before submitting a PR.
3. If the ticket is **Ready for Checkin** or **Someday/Maybe**, please discuss the situation on the [Django Forum](https://forum.djangoproject.com/) before proceeding.
4. Once the ticket is in an acceptable stage, reopen this PR.

For more information on the Django triage process see https://docs.djangoproject.com/en/dev/internals/contributing/triaging-tickets/.
